title: Crowmap
description: Maps update when they're not in your hand
body:
It's a mod that makes maps update when they're *anywhere* in your inventory, so you don't have to hold them in your hands to keep them up-to-date. Leaves your hands free to use weapons, eat food, place blocks or whatever.

No dependencies (not even Fabric API), so if it doesn't work with Sinytra Connector I'll be very surprised.

Adds a small tooltip just to let you know the mod is there. Since 1.1.0, this tooltip goes away after you look at it once.

*Why's it called "crowmap"?* Well, it was made for /u/Crowfooted, who requested it on reddit or something idk it's been a while.

Questions? Comments? Just lonely? Join me on Discord: https://highlysuspect.agency/discord/
